{{Infobox location
| name = Prime Arena
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The Prime Arena, also known as the [[Prime Coliseum]] of [[Visiria]], is a highly respected cultural institution located on the planet [[Visiria]]. It serves as a massive venue for combat, capable of hosting crowds of hundreds of thousands in person while reaching tens of millions of viewers across the galaxy via [[Subline]] feeds. The facility features rubberized turf and is capable of triggering ancient magic, such as the appearance of glowing golden symbols, during matches. The [[arena]] is home to prestigious [[Champions]], including [[Albedon Pegarthus]] and [[Varic Vallenar]], and has hosted legendary figures like [[Kyri Prest]]. Beyond its role as a sporting venue, the [[arena]] carries significant political weight; challenging its champions can be used as a method to demonstrate resolve or restore honor within the [[Senate]].}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|As a hallmark of the planet [[Visiria]], the Prime Arena is a grand sight that can be viewed through the floor-to-ceiling windows of the Governor's room. This combat [[arena]] features a combination of state-of-the-art technology and battered bronze plates. It serves as the venue where [[Albedon Pegarthus]] competes in his role as [[Champion]] and is a location where mages win rounds. Both [[Raion]] and Ryzer have been present within the [[arena]].}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Prime Arena]] of [[Visiria]] is a hallmark of the planet.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c25">''The Knight'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Raion]] and Ryzer are currently in the [[Prime Arena]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Prime Arena]] is a grand sight visible through a floor-to-ceiling window in the Governor's room.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c26">''The Knight'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Prime Arena]] is where [[Albedon Pegarthus]] competes as [[Champion]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Prime Arena]] is a combat [[arena]] with battered bronze plates and state-of-the-art technology.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c27">''The Knight'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Prime Arena]] is a location where Ryzer was present.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c29">''The Knight'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Prime Arena]] is an [[arena]] where mages win rounds.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c29" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
